data.body:
Goal:
Add a bulk "tag" (label) action to multi-select mode on the Queues screen so a user can apply one or more labels to all selected beats in a single operation, and restructure the multi-select action bar so it stays compact and legible. Today the bar (src/components/filter-bar.tsx BulkEditControls, ~line 285) renders Ship / Scene! / Merge / Refine Scope buttons plus four always-visible "Set ..." dropdowns (Type, Priority, Profile, State) plus Apply / Clear inside an overflow-x-auto strip; adding tags inline would push it further into horizontal scrolling. The backend path already exists: updateBeatSchema (src/lib/schemas.ts:55) supports labels and removeLabels, and onBulkUpdate takes UpdateBeatInput, so the work is UI-side wiring plus consolidation.

Verification:
1. In the worktree run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
2. Start the app (bun run dev) and open /beats?beatsView=queues against a repo with at least 3 queued beats.
3. Select 3 beats via row checkboxes; confirm the bar shows "3 selected".
4. Open the new bulk tag control, add two labels (e.g. triage and p2-batch), Apply. Confirm all 3 beats show both labels in beat detail after reload, and confirm on the underlying knots with: kno ls --json (each selected knot has the labels in its l/labels field).
5. Resize the window to 1280px and 768px widths with all controls present; confirm the bar does not require horizontal scrolling to reach Apply/Clear, and that the per-field editors are grouped into a single surface rather than N inline dropdowns.
6. Run quality gates: bun run lint && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun run test && bun run build (all pass).

Constraints:
- Reuse the existing onBulkUpdate({ labels }) / { removeLabels } path; do NOT invent a new API route or schema field.
- Do NOT hardcode workflow state names; state classification stays loom-derived (CLAUDE.md "State Classification Is Loom-Derived").
- No silent fallbacks (CLAUDE.md "Fail Loudly, Never Silently").
- Respect code-style limits: file <= 500 lines, function <= 100 lines, line <= 100 cols. filter-bar.tsx is already large, so extract sub-components / new files as needed rather than growing it.
- The header "select all" checkbox is page-scoped (table.toggleAllPageRowsSelected in src/components/beat-column-defs.tsx); leave that semantics unless explicitly changed, and if changed make whole-queue selection explicit in UI copy.
data.title: Bulk-tag selected beats on Queues + declutter multi-select bar
